title: cymbachne ciliata var. tumidula
intro: Cymbachne ciliata var. tumidula is a type of flowering plant in the family Poaceae, commonly known as a type of grass. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cymbachne ciliata var. tumidula include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
